creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Thanks Niclas, I am on 12.0-RELEASE. I have tried all from wiki on this Synaptics. Also other Toughbooks have this problem.

When I use hw.psm.synaptics_support=1 the mouse is not moving at all in moused nor in Xorg it is not recognised as xf86-input-synaptics.

This is strange because those Synaptics work fine with gestures on Windoze and Linux. Also some other mouses work with scrolling just out of the box even without hw.psm.synaptics_support enabled.

Also some folks told me about edev/eventdev system that can work with raw device so I could skip moused.. but still sometimes I am working in a raw console and moused would be nice to have (except that I have adopted TMUX for good and there is a nice copy-paste mechanism as well).

I think I will start a separate PR for this issue..?
